text:
Created attachment 246244
The patch for the port

Updated sysutils/fusefs-bindfs to 1.17.6

Changes relevant to FreeBSD since 1.17.4
 * Fixed negative UID/GID mapping offset behavior

Full changelog can be reviewed here: https://bindfs.org/docs/ChangeLog.utf8.txt
